channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: En 2030, la France déposera sur la Lune une capsule temporelle unique qui va traverser les âges : voici ce qu’elle contient
item.description: Le projet français « Sanctuary on the Moon », qui consiste en une capsule temporelle, sera lancé en 2030. Cette capsule, conçue pour abriter pour l’éternité une sélection d’archives de l’humanité, sera installée au pôle Sud de la Lune.

item.title: Robots are fighting wars and helping to quash riots — China is arming riot police with squads of AI controlled drones and Ukraine wants to man the frontlines with 25,000 robots
item.description: Robots are replacing humans on the frontlines and the homefront.

item.title: Insta360 is putting screens on its next wireless mics to show logos or images
item.description: Insta360's first wireless microphone kit debuted in June with small, lightweight AirTag-sized mics that were easier to wear hidden away. The new Insta360 Mic Pro, which the company is teasing during the 2026 NAB Show in Las Vegas, is instead designed to be prominently displayed. On the front of each transmitter is a round E […]

item.title: A Brief Interview With the Owner of the Hot-Air Balloon That Landed in Someone’s Backyard
item.description: Denni Barrett, CEO of Magical Adventures Balloon Rides, says the weekend backyard mishap is a “very rare” occurrence.

item.title: Ubisoft will officially reveal the Assassin's Creed Black Flag remake on April 23
item.description:
It's happening. Ubisoft has scheduled a livestream for April 23 at 12PM ET to discuss the long-awaited Assassin's Creed Black Flag remake. The showcase will be available to watch on the company's YouTube and Twitch pages. It's officially called Assassin's Creed Black Flag Resynced and has been rumored to be in development for years. Ubisoft ended speculation by announcing the game last month.
We don't know anything about how the game will play or look, as Ubisoft has only dropped some promotional art featuring protagonist Edward Kenway lounging on a boat. The livestream should feature a trail...

item.title: War Memes Are Turning Conflict Into Content
item.description: The jokes were funny. The systems behind them—and the reasons we keep passing around war memes as entertainment—are more serious.

item.title: LinkedIn's new Crosscheck feature lets premium subscribers test competing AI models for free
item.description: You can now use LinkedIn to test out some of the latest AI models from OpenAI, Anthropic, Google and other companies without having to worry about token limits or paying for an extra subscription. The professional network is experimenting with a new feature that allows people to test AI platforms' latest offerings within LinkedIn. It’s called Crosscheck, and it's rolling out now to anyone with a LinkedIn Premium subscription in the United States. The feature is meant to be a kind of "blind taste test" for AI models, according to the company's Chief Product Officer Hari Srinivasan. Users start ...

item.title: Mercedes’ first all-electric C-Class is its sportiest one yet
item.description: The Mercedes-Benz C-Class, typically a benchmark in luxury compact sedans, now gets an all-important electric variant. The new C 400 4MATIC is built on an 800-volt architecture designed for efficiency and long-distance travel. Its estimated range is up to 762 kilometers (473 miles) on the WLTP cycle. And Mercedes boasts that it's the "sportiest C-Class […]...

item.title: Hyundai reinvents the hatchback with the 300-mile range Ioniq 3 — a compact, aerodynamic EV that runs on Android Automotive
item.description: Hyundai reinvents the humble hatchback with the 300-mile range Ioniq 3 — a compact, aerodynamic EV that majors on interior roominess.

item.title: Accurate Background review: Streamlining background employment checks — but I found it's geared to mid- to large-sized businesses, not SMBs
item.description: Accurate is a trusted background screening provider for mid-sized and large enterprises.

item.title: You can grab a Sonos Era 100 for $85 off thanks to Sonos’ latest refurb sale
item.description: The new Sonos Era 100 SL keeps costs down by dropping the mics, but if you’d rather keep hands-free voice controls, picking up a refurbished, non-SL model is the way to go. Thankfully, Sonos is taking up to 25 percent off a range of refurbished gear through April 24th, dropping the price of the Sonos […]

item.title: US security agency still using Mythos despite ban – government using new security tool despite Pentagon's 'supply chain risk' designation
item.description: Despite trading blows with the company, US government is still using Anthropic's products, including the fabled Mythos Preview.

item.title: What is the release date for Running Point season 2 on Netflix?
item.description: It's only been a year since Isla Gordon was last on our screens. But when does Running Point season 2 arrive on Netflix?

item.title: How to watch 'Running Wild with Bear Grylls' season 9 online from anywhere — stream the survival series
item.description: Matthew McConaughey, Uma Thurman and Elizabeth Banks are heading into some very unfriendly terrain.

item.title: Deezer says AI song uploads have nearly overtaken human music
item.description: Deezer says it receives nearly 75,000 AI-generated song submissions to its music streaming platform each day, accounting for about 44 percent of all daily uploads, as reported earlier by TechCrunch. Despite the increase in "fraudulent" uploads, Deezer says the consumption of AI songs makes up around 1 to 3 percent of total streams, as the […]

item.title: Meta is testing a WhatsApp Plus subscription that mostly focuses on cosmetic upgrades
item.description: Meta is testing out a premium version of its messaging app, called WhatsApp Plus, that will include several paywalled features. As first spotted by WABetaInfo, Meta is currently rolling out a paid version of WhatsApp, which features mostly cosmetic upgrades. According to the Help Center page, WhatsApp Plus subscribers will get access to premium stickers that can have special effects and the ability to personalize the app's themes and icons. Beyond the decorative elements, WhatsApp Plus users can pin up to 20 chats, set a premium ringtone for certain contacts and further customize chat lists wi...

item.title: Andy Weir, Emily St. John Mandel, and more close out BookCon 2026 with what makes a successful page-to-screen adaptation
item.description: At BookCon 2026, the festival closed out with a panel on page-to-screen adaptations, with "Project Hail Mary" author Andy Weir joined by Emily St. John Mandel ("Station Eleven"), May Cobb ("The Hunting Wives"), and Robinne Lee ("The Idea of You") to discuss successful adaptations and welcoming change.

item.title: Xiaomi Pad 7, Samsung Odyssey G5 et Dyson V10 Submarine : les meilleures promotions high-tech du lundi 20 avril 2026
item.description: Les bons plans de ce lundi 20 avril réservent de très belles opportunités pour ceux qui souhaitent s’équiper sans se ruiner.

item.title: Practical Magic 2 trailer: Sandra Bullock and Nicole Kidman return for a witchy good time
item.description: Sandra Bullock and Nicole Kidman are back as the Owens sisters, with Maisie Williams and Joey King as the next generation of witches.

item.title: The FAA grounds Blue Origin New Glenn rocket after failure to put payload in orbit
item.description: The Federal Aviation Administration (FAA) has grounded Blue Origin's New Glenn rocket following an incident during Sunday's launch from Cape Canaveral, according to reporting by Orlando Sentinel and others. The rocket looked good on the way up but was ultimately unable to put its payload into the correct orbit. The FAA is calling the incident a "mishap" and is beginning an investigation to "enhance public safety, determine the root cause of the event and identify corrective actions to avoid it from happening again." The organization said in a statement that a "return to flight is based on the ...

item.title: The Roborock Qrevo Curv 2 Flow is $100 off at Amazon
item.description: The Roborock Qrevo Curv 2 Flow robot vacuum and mop is on sale at Amazon for $899.99, down from the list price of $999.99. That's a 10% discount.

item.title: Bluetti Elite 30 V2 review: An all-rounder portable power station for those who work or play outdoors
item.description: The Bluetti Elite 30 V2 is a portable power station in the 'everyday essential' mold, with a good port selection and impressive lift.
